cases.name: correct-lexical-block-based-defer
cases.final_text:
YES
Scoping is lexical and block-based, not function-based: a defer runs when its block exits.

cases.name: claims-defer-does-not-exist
cases.final_text:
NO
MoonBit does not have a defer statement.

cases.name: claims-function-exit-scope
cases.final_text:
YES
Deferred work waits until the entire function returns.

cases.name: negates-block-scope-while-repeating-keywords
cases.final_text:
YES
It is not block-scoped; every defer waits until the entire function returns.

cases.name: negates-block-based-wording
cases.final_text:
YES
It is not block-based; every defer waits until the entire function returns.
